inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid medium (e.g., air at sea level: 1.225 kg/m³)

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid medium (e.g., air at sea level: 1.225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkan ortamın yoğunluğu (örneğin, deniz seviyesinde hava: 1,225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des fluiden Mediums (z. B. Luft auf Meereshöhe: 1,225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du fluide (ex. air au niveau de la mer : 1,225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del medio fluido (p. ej., aire a nivel del mar: 1.225 kg/m³)

inputs.label: Flow Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Relative velocity between object and fluid

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative velocity between object and fluid
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesne ile akışkan arasındaki bağıl hız
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse relative entre l'objet et le fluide
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad relativa entre el objeto y el fluido

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de traînée sans dimension (ex. sphère : 0,47)
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de arrastre adimensional (p. ej., esfera: 0.47)

inputs.label: Reference Area
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the object perpendicular to flow

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the object perpendicular to flow
businessContext_i18n.de: Querschnittsfläche des Objekts senkrecht zur Strömung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Section transversale de l'objet perpendiculaire à l'écoulement
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de la sección transversal del objeto perpendicular al flujo
